speaker: speaker1
text: Were you able to attend Friday night's basketball game ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I was unable to make it .

speaker: speaker1
text: You should have been there . It was intense .

speaker: speaker2
text: Is that right . Who ended up winning ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I wish I was free that night . I'm kind of mad that I didn't go .

speaker: speaker2
text: What was the score at the end of the game ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sounds like it was a close game .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's the reason it was such a great game .

speaker: speaker2
text: The next game , I will definitely be there .
